testsuite.name: Scenario: eating a lot without waiting should not growl

testcase.name: Given I have eaten 42 cukes
testcase.classname: Scenario: eating a lot without waiting should not growl

testcase.name: Then my belly should not growl
testcase.classname: Scenario: eating a lot without waiting should not growl

testcase.name: classMethod
testcase.classname: Scenario: eating a lot without waiting should not growl

testsuite.system-out: I'm eating 42 cukes! I ate 42 cucumbers.
